# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties: 
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-12345678
      KeyName: MyKeyPair
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: subnet-0bb1c79de3EXAMPLE
          GroupSet:
            - sg-903004f8
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdh
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
  MyEBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      Size: 20
      VolumeType: gp2
  MyVolumeAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref MyEC2Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref MyEBSVolume
      Device: /dev/sdh
